prompt: Ultra-cinematic golden hour portrait of a beautiful young woman sitting by the window inside a moving train, wrapped in an oversized charcoal knit sweater, long naturally tousled dark hair illuminated by warm sunlight, soft relaxed expression with subtle smile, candid lifestyle photography. Rich golden-hour sunlight streams through the train window, creating soft highlights across her face and hair while the cabin falls into deep cinematic shadows. Vintage train interior with passengers softly blurred in the background, warm practical lights glowing overhead, dreamy atmosphere, subtle window reflections, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin texture, natural imperfections, soft bloom, Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic, muted earthy color grading, gentle film grain, authentic travel mood, intimate storytelling composition, Leica M11, 50mm Summilux f/1.4, f/1.4, HDR, ultra-photorealistic, editorial fashion photography, award-winning travel portrait, 8K.
promptEn: Ultra-cinematic golden hour portrait of a beautiful young woman sitting by the window inside a moving train, wrapped in an oversized charcoal knit sweater, long naturally tousled dark hair illuminated by warm sunlight, soft relaxed expression with subtle smile, candid lifestyle photography. Rich golden-hour sunlight streams through the train window, creating soft highlights across her face and hair while the cabin falls into deep cinematic shadows. promptZh: 极具电影感的黄金时刻人像，描绘了一位 美丽的年轻女性 坐在行驶火车内的窗边，身穿一件 炭灰色廓形针织毛衣，长发自然凌乱，被温暖的阳光照亮，表情柔和放松，带着淡淡的微笑，纪实生活摄影风格。浓郁的黄金时刻阳光透过火车窗户倾泻而入，在她的脸庞和发丝上勾勒出柔和的高光，而车厢则沉浸在深邃的电影感阴影中。复古火车内饰，背景中的乘客呈现柔和的模糊效果，头顶的实用灯光发出暖光，氛围梦幻，带有细微的窗户倒影，浅景深，奶油般虚化效果，真实的皮肤纹理，自然的瑕疵，柔和的光晕，Kodak Portra 400 胶片美学，柔和的大地色调，细腻的胶片颗粒，真实的旅行氛围，充满叙事感的构图，Leica M11，50mm Summilux f/1.4，f/1.4，HDR，超写实，时尚杂志摄影，获奖旅行人像，8K。
